subcodes.first_line: O 'Azim! The Great News hath come, the Straight Path hath appeared, and the Call hath been raised from a near quarter. Glorified be God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عظیم نبا عظیم آمد صراط مستقیم ظاهر شد ندا از شطر قریب مرتفع گشت سبحان الله
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
